office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy and oversee county departments and services.
race_blurb: Incumbent Justin Dixon faces Gary Bowles, for whom only filing-level evidence was available.

highlights: Served as commission chairman during the 2026 District 1 appointment [S2]
